# Managing Risk, Friction, and Growth Under PSD2

![pettern](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%20684%20460'%3E%3C/svg%3E)

The Second Payments Services Directive (PSD2) is a step toward more open and secure online payments, but it presents merchants with new challenges.

Read the one-pager to learn:

*   What’s changing under PSD2
*   Why you should care about new requirements
*   What an effective action plan that balances friction and growth looks like

### See How Sift Supports PSD2 Compliance
